'''âg-t-f''' ('''kagataf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vanquish|vanquish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-t-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vanquish|vanquish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-t-f
|-
! Lemma
| kagataf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigataf|thigataf]] || [[word:jigataf|jigataf]] || [[word:shigataf|shigataf]] || [[word:kigataf|kigataf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugataf|thuthugataf]] || [[word:jujugataf|jujugataf]] || [[word:shushugataf|shushugataf]] || [[word:kukugataf|kukugataf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugataf|thugataf]] || [[word:jugataf|jugataf]] || [[word:shugataf|shugataf]] || [[word:kugataf|kugataf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugataf|thugataf]] || [[word:jugataf|jugataf]] || [[word:shugataf|shugataf]] || [[word:kugataf|kugataf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegataf|thegataf]] || [[word:jegataf|jegataf]] || [[word:shegataf|shegataf]] || [[word:kegataf|kegataf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogataf|thothogataf]] || [[word:jojogataf|jojogataf]] || [[word:shoshogataf|shoshogataf]] || [[word:kokogataf|kokogataf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogataf|thogataf]] || [[word:jogataf|jogataf]] || [[word:shogataf|shogataf]] || [[word:kogataf|kogataf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogataf|thogataf]] || [[word:jogataf|jogataf]] || [[word:shogataf|shogataf]] || [[word:kogataf|kogataf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgataf|thĂŠgataf]] || [[word:jĂŠgataf|jĂŠgataf]] || [[word:shĂŠgataf|shĂŠgataf]] || [[word:kĂŠgataf|kĂŠgataf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagataf|thathagataf]] || [[word:jajagataf|jajagataf]] || [[word:shashagataf|shashagataf]] || [[word:kakagataf|kakagataf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagataf|thagataf]] || [[word:jagataf|jagataf]] || [[word:shagataf|shagataf]] || [[word:kagataf|kagataf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagataf|thagataf]] || [[word:jagataf|jagataf]] || [[word:shagataf|shagataf]] || [[word:kagataf|kagataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagataf|shagataf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagataf|goshagataf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagataf|gokishagataf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagatafnĂŒ|shagatafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagatafnknĂŒ|goshagatafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagatafnĂŒ|gokishagatafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagatafshĂ«|shagatafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagatafnkshĂ«|goshagatafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagatafshĂ«|gokishagatafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagatafro|shagatafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagatafnkro|goshagatafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagatafro|gokishagatafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagatafmu|shagatafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagatafnkmu|goshagatafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagatafmu|gokishagatafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagatafsher|shagatafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagatafnksher|goshagatafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagatafsher|gokishagatafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagatafng|shagatafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagatafnkng|goshagatafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagatafng|gokishagatafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagatafya|shagatafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagatafnkya|goshagatafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagatafya|gokishagatafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagatafyam|shagatafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagatafnkyam|goshagatafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagatafyam|gokishagatafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagatafnĂŒshĂ«|shagatafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagatafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagatafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagatafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagatafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagatafnĂŒro|shagatafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagatafnknĂŒro|goshagatafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagatafnĂŒro|gokishagatafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagatafnĂŒmu|shagatafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagatafnknĂŒmu|goshagatafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagatafnĂŒmu|gokishagatafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagatafshĂ«nĂŒ|shagatafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagatafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagatafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagatafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagatafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagatafshĂ«ro|shagatafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagatafnkshĂ«ro|goshagatafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagatafshĂ«ro|gokishagatafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagatafshĂ«mu|shagatafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagatafnkshĂ«mu|goshagatafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagatafshĂ«mu|gokishagatafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagatafronĂŒ|shagatafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagatafnkronĂŒ|goshagatafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagatafronĂŒ|gokishagatafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagatafroshĂ«|shagatafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagatafnkroshĂ«|goshagatafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagatafroshĂ«|gokishagatafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagatafromu|shagatafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagatafnkromu|goshagatafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagatafromu|gokishagatafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagatafmunĂŒ|shagatafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagatafnkmunĂŒ|goshagatafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagatafmunĂŒ|gokishagatafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagatafmushĂ«|shagatafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagatafnkmushĂ«|goshagatafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagatafmushĂ«|gokishagatafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagatafmuro|shagatafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagatafnkmuro|goshagatafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagatafmuro|gokishagatafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
